resolvedRisks.resolution: Focus ring alpha increased and transparent outline retained for accessibility fallback.
Text moved to --nos-color-text over accent background to avoid white-on-accent threshold risk.
Accent text darkened by mixing with --nos-color-text without using green authority styling.
Warning surface gained border and darker warning/text mix.
Hardcoded legacy colors replaced with Research OS warning/accent token mixes.

remainingRisks.risk: Timeline is visually warmer, but still needs rendered review for dense mission histories.
Logs are calmer but still represent technical output, not a full Mission Activity Feed.
--green, --red, --amber, --blue and --black remain for compatibility until usage cleanup is approved.

deferredRisks.reason: M620 is CSS-only; semantic markup changes require Claude or separate approval.
M620 cannot change action labels, runtime state copy or event handling.

manualQaChecklist: Keyboard tab through controls and confirm focus ring is visible on warm surfaces.
Compare active tab contrast in Chrome sidepanel rendering.
Review timeline cards with completed, running, warning and blocked states.
Confirm recording state does not look like active runtime authority.
Confirm consent and handoff panels still communicate governance and human authority.
Confirm logs remain secondary and do not appear as source of truth.
